title: Auto-detect provider models (sync model catalog from provider API) — hybrid

tasks.title: Add Zod schemas for detected models + sync result in @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Add AiProviderModelSchema ({ id, source: 'detected'|'curated'|'both', label?, capabilityHint?, deprecated? }) and AiSyncModelsResultSchema ({ providerId, models: AiProviderModel[], fetchedAt, warnings? }) in packages/schemas/src/entities/ai/. Export from the ai entity barrel. Tests in __tests__/ (package convention). DONE: ai-sync-models.schema.ts + __tests__/ai-sync-models.schema.test.ts, 12/12 pass.

tasks.title: Extract curated provider catalog (KNOWN_PROVIDERS) into a shared module
tasks.description: Move the inline KNOWN_PROVIDERS catalog from apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/ai/credentials.tsx into @repo/schemas (packages/schemas/src/entities/ai/ai-provider-catalog.ts), exported from the ai barrel; re-point admin to import it. Admin behavior identical. DONE: ai-provider-catalog.ts (KNOWN_PROVIDERS + KnownProvider + KnownProviderId + getKnownProvider) + __tests__ 9/9; admin re-pointed, inline removed.

subtasks.title: Re-point admin credentials.tsx to the shared source

tasks.title: Standalone listProviderModels() fetcher — OpenAI + OpenAI-compatible
tasks.description: Create packages/ai-core/src/providers/list-models.ts exporting listProviderModels({ providerId, apiKey, baseURL? }). Plain fetch, NO @ai-sdk, NO adapter edit (OQ-4 → zero HOS-88 conflict). OpenAI + compatible (/v1/models, Bearer). DONE: list-models.ts (resolveProviderFamily + fetchModelsForFamily dispatch seam for T-004/T-005; ListModelsError family) + test/list-models.test.ts 18/18; exported from providers/index.ts.

subtasks.title: Unit tests with fetch mock + fixture

tasks.title: Fetcher: Anthropic + Google Gemini cases
tasks.description: Extend list-models.ts: Anthropic GET https://api.anthropic.com/v1/models with headers x-api-key + anthropic-version, parse data[].id. Gemini GET https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models?key=<key>, parse models[].name and strip the 'models/' prefix. Replace the T-003 dispatch-seam placeholders (fetchModelsForFamily 'anthropic'/'gemini' branches). Tests: fixtures for both providers assert correct headers/URL and parsed ids (incl. Gemini prefix strip).

subtasks.title: Gemini case (query key + models/ prefix strip)

tasks.title: Fetcher: Ollama case + per-provider baseURL convention
tasks.description: Extend list-models.ts: Ollama GET {baseURL}/api/tags (no auth), parse models[].name (replace the T-003 'ollama' dispatch-seam placeholder). Implement the OQ-5 per-provider path convention: openai-compatible → {baseURL}/v1/models, ollama → {baseURL}/api/tags, gemini → /v1beta/models. No per-credential path override in v1. Tests: Ollama fixture; convention resolves the right URL per providerId.

tasks.title: Chat-capability filter (denylist + 'uncertain' bucket)
tasks.description: Implement the OQ-1 filter in apps/api (provider-agnostic classifier): hide known non-chat families (text-embedding, whisper, tts, dall-e, *-moderation, deprecated); anything not confidently classified is tagged 'uncertain' (surfaced, not dropped). Pure function over raw ids. Tests: embeddings/tts/dall-e/moderation hidden; gpt-*/claude-* pass; unknown id → uncertain.

tasks.title: Merge detected ∪ curated (source annotation)
tasks.description: Implement the merge in apps/api using the shared curated catalog (T-002, @repo/schemas KNOWN_PROVIDERS/getKnownProvider): model in both → source 'both' (curated metadata wins); detected-only → 'detected'; curated-only → 'curated'. De-dup by id. Pure function. Tests: all three source outcomes; de-dup; empty detected → curated only.

tasks.title: Sync-models orchestration service in apps/api
tasks.description: Add a service (apps/api/src/services/ai-sync-models.service.ts) that: resolves the actor, calls getDecryptedAiProviderCredential(providerId), invokes listProviderModels (with metadata.baseURL), applies the filter (T-006) then the merge (T-007), and returns AiSyncModelsResultSchema. Typed errors: invalid key → PROVIDER_UNCONFIGURED/auth; upstream failure → SYNC_MODELS_FAILED. Never logs/returns the key. Tests: mock vault + fetcher — happy path, bad key, provider down.

subtasks.title: Unit tests (happy / bad key / provider down)

tasks.title: Admin route POST /credentials/{providerId}/sync-models
tasks.description: Add an action-POST route in apps/api/src/routes/ai/credentials/index.ts via createAdminRoute: path '/{providerId}/sync-models', requiredPermissions [AI_SETTINGS_MANAGE], requestParams { providerId }, responseSchema AiSyncModelsResultSchema, calling the T-008 service. Register in the router assembly. Add the endpoint-gate-matrix row + OpenAPI metadata. Tests: 403 for non-super-admin, 200 happy path (service mocked), 4xx on bad key.

tasks.title: Auto-sync on credential create/rotate (fail-open)
tasks.description: Wire the T-008 service into createAiProviderCredential and rotateAiProviderCredential (ai-credential-vault.service.ts) so a sync runs after a successful create/rotate — but FAIL-OPEN (OQ-2 hard req): any list-models failure must NOT break the credential save; it is swallowed into a non-blocking warning, the credential is still persisted. Tests: credential save succeeds even when the fetcher throws; success path populates suggestions.

tasks.title: Admin UI — 'Sync models' button + mutation + detected/curated render
tasks.description: In apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/ai/credentials.tsx add a per-provider 'Sync models' button; add a TanStack Query mutation in features/ai-settings/hooks.ts calling the new endpoint. Render results grouped/badged by source (Detected/Curated/Both, highlight new detected). Preserve the existing enable-toggle + custom-add UX; confirming persists the enabled set to metadata.models via the existing update mutation. i18n all new strings.

subtasks.title: Persist enabled set via existing update mutation

tasks.title: Admin UI — loading / empty / error states for sync
tasks.description: Add explicit states to the sync flow in credentials.tsx: loading spinner during sync, 'No chat models detected for this key' empty state, and an inline error banner for auth/network/rate-limit with a retry. i18n all strings. Tests: component/behavior tests for the three states (mocked mutation).

tasks.title: Integration tests — sync-models endpoint across all providers
tasks.description: End-to-end integration tests for POST /credentials/{providerId}/sync-models using fixtures per provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama, and an OpenAI-compatible via baseURL). Assert filter (non-chat hidden), merge (source tagging), and the fail-open create/rotate path. Follow ai-core testing rules (StubProvider / mocked fetch, NO real provider calls).

tasks.title: Isolation guard — fetcher stays SDK-free and env-free
tasks.description: Confirm/extend the ac4 isolation guard so the new list-models.ts does not import ai/@ai-sdk/* outside the allowed providers/ boundary (it uses plain fetch) and reads no process.env. Verify @repo/db is not imported. Tests: assert the guard passes with the new module present. NOTE (from T-003): list-models.ts mirrors OpenAiAdapter.moderate()'s existing plain-fetch precedent, so no special-casing should be needed — just confirm.

tasks.title: Docs + gate-matrix + i18n finalization
tasks.description: Document the feature: update apps/api/CLAUDE.md AI section and/or packages/ai-core/README.md with the list-models fetcher + sync-models endpoint (note: no migration, ephemeral suggestions, fail-open auto-sync). Confirm the endpoint-gate-matrix row and that all new admin strings have i18n keys (es/en/pt). No env var added.
